sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, start_time TIMESTAMP, end_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamps (start_time, end_time) VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 12:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 14:30:00');
UPDATE timestamps SET start_time = TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 13:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT timestampdiff_min(start_time, end_time) FROM timestamps WHERE id = 1;
